summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CloseLoop B2B SaaS application. Backend APIs are fully functional (15/15 tests passed). Frontend has working core features but authentication persistence and some routing issues need attention.

ui_bugs.issue: Pricing page redirects back to home page instead of displaying pricing tiers
Login form shows 'Signing in...' state but authentication may not persist properly

integration_issues.issue: Users get logged out when navigating between pages, requiring re-authentication

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all sections and navigation

high_priority: Fix authentication persistence - users get logged out when navigating between protected routes
Fix pricing page routing - currently redirects to home instead of showing pricing content
medium_priority: Test and verify the Call Review page (THE HERO FEATURE) functionality with proper authentication
Ensure admin features (Data Vault, Team management) are accessible when properly authenticated
action_item_for_main_agent.notes: Backend is solid with all APIs working. Main issues are frontend authentication state management and routing. The core application functionality is implemented correctly.
